notes: Load-buffer/filter fallback candidate; keeps the 3-stage BJT gain path and adds one ideal ahdLib-equivalent OPAMP follower plus two 10k/150p output RC filter poles; 10 pF loaded; ideal buffer noise is not modeled. AC nRMSE uses gain dB over 1 Hz to 1 MHz; transient nRMSE uses 2.5 V - 100*(vin-2.5) target from 50 ms to 100 ms; low slopes 0.316-3.162Hz=72.52 dB/dec and 1-10Hz=49.26 dB/dec; high slopes 10k-100k=-28.4 dB/dec, 20k-200k=-48.9 dB/dec, 100k-1Meg=-87.17 dB/dec
